title: 怎麼看-俄軍瓦格納頭目"普里格金"單方面宣布將在5/10號從前線巴赫穆特撤退?
meta_description: 怎麼看-俄軍瓦格納頭目"普里格金"單方面宣布將在5/10號從前線巴赫穆特撤退? - 書面申明 https://twitter.com/NOELreports/status/1654397766288781312 視頻 https://twitter.com/NOELreports/status/1654397764569104384  A...

contents:
書面申明
https://twitter.com/NOELreports/status/1654397766288781312
視頻
https://twitter.com/NOELreports/status/1654397764569104384

A statement from Wagner PMC group by Prigozhin.

Prigozhin claims that Wagner will leave Bakhmut by May 10 and hand over positions to the troops of the Russian Federation and 'lick their wounds'.

"Because, in the absence of ammunition, they are doomed to a senseless death."
